{"success":true,"response":"The process 'J09B' has been completed successfully:

1. ✅ Created temporary table J09B_temp with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the table
3. ✅ Applied all rules:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if less than 3 EQUNR per HAUS, otherwise "EVU"
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 to "EVU" (no rows matched)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 500-599 to "EVU" (no rows matched)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 900-999 to "EVU" (7 rows updated)
   - Set houses with Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU" (no rows matched)
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table using ANLAGE/Installation
5. ✅ Joined with net_master and sales_master tables using EQUNR
6. ✅ Applied logic: used sales data if available, otherwise net data
7. ✅ Exported final data to CSV file J09B.csv (20,180 rows)
8. ✅ Sent email with attachment to meter.readings@evu.com
9. ✅ Deleted temporary table J09B_temp

The process has been completed successfully.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
The process 'J09B' has been completed successfully:

1. ✅ Created temporary table J09B_temp with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the table
3. ✅ Applied all rules:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if less than 3 EQUNR per HAUS, otherwise "EVU"
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 to "EVU" (no rows matched)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 500-599 to "EVU" (no rows matched)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 900-999 to "EVU" (7 rows updated)
   - Set houses with Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU" (no rows matched)
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table using ANLAGE/Installation
5. ✅ Joined with net_master and sales_master tables using EQUNR
6. ✅ Applied logic: used sales data if available, otherwise net data
7. ✅ Exported final data to CSV file J09B.csv (20,180 rows)
8. ✅ Sent email with attachment to meter.readings@evu.com
9. ✅ Deleted temporary table J09B_temp

The process has been completed successfully.

kwargs.content:
The process 'J09B' has been completed successfully:

1. ✅ Created temporary table J09B_temp with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the table
3. ✅ Applied all rules:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if less than 3 EQUNR per HAUS, otherwise "EVU"
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 to "EVU" (no rows matched)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 500-599 to "EVU" (no rows matched)
   - Set HOUSE_NUM1 900-999 to "EVU" (7 rows updated)
   - Set houses with Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU" (no rows matched)
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table using ANLAGE/Installation
5. ✅ Joined with net_master and sales_master tables using EQUNR
6. ✅ Applied logic: used sales data if available, otherwise net data
7. ✅ Exported final data to CSV file J09B.csv (20,180 rows)
8. ✅ Sent email with attachment to meter.readings@evu.com
9. ✅ Deleted temporary table J09B_temp

The process has been completed successfully.
